1.gl: properly, to turn aside from the road (for a lodging or any other purpose), i.e. sojourn (as a guest); also to shrink, fear (as in a strange place); also to gather forhostility (as afraid)
1.kj: abide, assemble, be afraid, dwell, fear, gather (together), inhabitant, remain, sojourn, stand in awe, (be) stranger, [idiom] surely.

1.gl: properly, to pull up, especially the tent-pins, i.e. start on ajourney
1.kj: cause to blow, bring, get, (make to) go (away, forth, forward, onward, out), (take) journey, march, remove, set aside (forward), [idiom] still, be on his (go their) way.

1.gl: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
1.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
1.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));

1.gl: the south (from its drought); specifically, the Negeb or southern district of Judah, occasionally, Egypt (as south to Palestine)
1.dv: from an unused root meaning to be parched;

16.gl: hence (the ox's head being the first letter of the alphabet, and this eventually used as a numeral) a thousand

17.gl: to bear young; causatively, to beget; medically, to act as midwife; specifically, to show lineage
17.kj: bear, beget, birth(-day), born, (make to) bring forth (children, young), bring up, calve, child, come, be delivered (of a child), time of delivery, gender, hatch, labour, (do the o

17.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
17.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.
(adulter) ess, each, every, female, [idiom] many, [phrase] none, one, [phrase] together, wife, woman. Often unexpressed in English.
17.dv: feminine of H376 (אִישׁ) or H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ); irregular plural, נָשִׁים;(used in the same wide sense as H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ))

17.gl: properly, to mend (by stitching), i.e. (figuratively) to cure
17.kj: cure, (cause to) heal, physician, repair, [idiom] thoroughly, make whole. See H7503 (רָפָה).

17.gl: to judge (officially or mentally); by extension, to intercede, pray
Abraham, the later name of Abram
17.dv: contracted from H1 (אָב) and an unused root (probably meaning to be populous); father of a multitude;

18.gl: a word; by implication, a matter (as spoken of) or thing; adverbially, a cause
18.kj: act, advice, affair, answer, [idiom] any such (thing), because of, book, business, care, case, cause, certain rate, [phrase] chronicles, commandment, [idiom] commune(-ication), [ph

18.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
18.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra

18.gl: to inclose; by analogy, to hold back; also to maintain, rule, assemble
18.kj: [idiom] be able, close up, detain, fast, keep (self close, still), prevail, recover, refrain, [idiom] reign, restrain, retain, shut (up), slack, stay, stop, withhold (self).
(adulter) ess, each, every, female, [idiom] many, [phrase] none, one, [phrase] together, wife, woman. Often unexpressed in English.
18.dv: feminine of H376 (אִישׁ) or H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ); irregular plural, נָשִׁים;(used in the same wide sense as H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ))

18.gl: in up to or over against; generally at, beside, among, behind, for, etc.
18.kj: about, at by (means of), for, over, through, up (-on), within.

18.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
18.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
